title: Top scores for de krans in atkin report
description: BUSINESS NEWS - De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp remains without a doubt one of SA’s leading port producers. This statement was reaffirmed with the Cape Vintage Reserve 2022 being this year’s top scorer, earning an impressive 94 points. While the port-style wine took top honours, a further four of De Krans’ wines received a score of 90+ by revered UK authority Tim Atkin MW, in his highly anticipated annual South African Wine Report.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - De Krans Wines in Calitzdorp remains without a doubt one of SA’s leading port producers. This statement was reaffirmed with the Cape Vintage Reserve 2022 being this year’s top scorer, earning an impressive 94 points. While the port-style wine took top honours, a further four of De Krans’ wines received a score of 90+ by revered UK authority Tim Atkin MW, in his highly anticipated annual South African Wine Report."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Cape Tawny Limited Release and Tritonia Red 2022 each received 92 points, with the Garden Route Sauvignon Blanc 2024 scoring 91, and the Touriga Nacional 2022 90 points out of a possible 100."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Atkin, a British Master of Wine and accomplished wine commentator with extensive experience of South African wines, tasted a total of 2,256 wines from 425 producers for his 2024 Special Report.","html":"Atkin, a British Master of Wine and accomplished wine commentator with extensive experience of South African wines, tasted a total of 2,256 wines from 425 producers for his 2024 Special Report."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Consistently a top achiever in Atkin’s SA Wine Report, the Cape Vintage Reserve Port is best described as a big wine full of ripe dark fruit notes of plum, mulberry and black currants. Well-rounded with smooth dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins are prominent in this port-style wine that would mature well over 30 years. Without a doubt one to add to your collection, the De Krans Cape Vintage Reserve Port 2022 will be available directly from the cellar towards the end of the year.","html":"Consistently a top achiever in Atkin’s SA Wine Report, the Cape Vintage Reserve Port is best described as a big wine full of ripe dark fruit notes of plum, mulberry and black currants. Well-rounded with smooth dark chocolate undertones and firm tannins are prominent in this port-style wine that would mature well over 30 years. Without a doubt one to add to your collection, the De Krans Cape Vintage Reserve Port 2022 will be available directly from the cellar towards the end of the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on the impressive range of wines from De Krans, visit www.dekrans.co.za","html":"For more information on the impressive range of wines from De Krans, visit www.dekrans.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Date issued: September 2024Issued by: On the marque pr & communicationsOn behalf of: De krans winesMedia queries: Pippa pringle | on the marque pr & communications  071 461 6692 | [email protected]","html":"Date issued: September 2024
Issued by: On the marque pr & communications
On behalf of: De krans wines
Media queries: Pippa pringle | on the marque pr & communications
071 461 6692 | [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
